  1. network.ike.plugin.scaffold

Uses of Interface
network.ike.plugin.scaffold.TierAction

Packages that use TierAction
Package
Description
network.ike.plugin.scaffold
 

  • Uses of TierAction in network.ike.plugin.scaffold

    Classes in network.ike.plugin.scaffold that implement TierAction
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    TierAction.Skip
    Publish must not touch TierAction.Skip.resolvedDest() because the user has diverged from the last-applied version.
    static final record 
    TierAction.UpToDate
    Nothing to write — target already matches the current template.
    static final record 
    TierAction.UserManaged
    Publish must not touch TierAction.UserManaged.resolvedDest() because at least one managed element already exists with a value the user has chosen, and policy is to defer to the user's value rather than overwrite it.
    static final record 
    TierAction.Write
    Publish should write newContent to TierAction.Write.resolvedDest().
    Methods in network.ike.plugin.scaffold that return TierAction
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TierAction
    ModelPlanResult.action()
    Returns the value of the action record component.
    TierAction
    PlannedEntry.action()
    Returns the value of the action record component.
    TierAction
    TierHandler.plan(ManifestEntry entry, Path resolvedDest, byte[] currentContent, byte[] templateContent, LockfileEntry priorEntry)
    Plan a single entry.
    TierAction
    ToolOwnedTierHandler.plan(ManifestEntry entry, Path resolvedDest, byte[] currentContent, byte[] templateContent, LockfileEntry priorEntry)
     
    TierAction
    TrackedBlockTierHandler.plan(ManifestEntry entry, Path resolvedDest, byte[] currentContent, byte[] templateContent, LockfileEntry priorEntry)
     
    TierAction
    TrackedTierHandler.plan(ManifestEntry entry, Path resolvedDest, byte[] currentContent, byte[] templateContent, LockfileEntry priorEntry)

    ModelPlanResult(TierAction action, List<ManagedElement> managedElements)
